2.title: Common connections
2.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.profile.server.ssl.stat.tot.compat.conns.count),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:profile }
| fieldsAdd f5:profile_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:profile)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20
